result.summary: The page is generally usable, but several elements appear clipped or crowded at the right edge, suggesting horizontal overflow or incomplete carousel positioning. The fixed bottom navigation also visually overlaps the content area near the bottom of the screenshot.

issues.description: Several game cards in the right column are partially cut off by the viewport edge, making the layout look broken or horizontally overflowing.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the game grid for the mobile viewport, such as using a 2-column layout, adding proper carousel behavior, or ensuring cards fit within the visible width with consistent padding.

issues.description: The top category navigation is clipped on the right side; the 'Hot Ga...' tab is only partially visible.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the category nav has clear horizontal scrolling, visible spacing, or responsive sizing so partially visible items do not look accidentally cut off.

issues.description: The bottom fixed navigation overlaps the lower game thumbnails, cutting into the visible content area at the bottom of the screen.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding to the scrollable page content equal to the height of the fixed navigation bar so content is not hidden behind it.

issues.description: Some carousel and card edge elements are very close to the viewport boundary, including the hero carousel arrow on the right and partially visible thumbnails, making the page feel cramped.
issues.suggestion: Add consistent side padding or safe-area spacing around horizontally scrolling sections and carousel controls.
